name: mathlib-ml-arch
description: Production-ready ML architecture audits grounded in Lean/mathlib evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Audit ML architecture claims with formal support boundaries
interface.longDescription: A production-ready skill-only plugin for ML architecture audits. It separates formal support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps, and emits a compact artifact bundle with report.md and evidence.json, without UI or server dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Audit this ML architecture for role mixing and hidden assumption leaks
Generate report.md and evidence.json for the current architecture review
Recheck the current architecture audit and tighten unsupported claims
